design_concept.identity: Industrial Editorial (Swiss Brutalist + Tech Camera UI)
design_concept.description: Fusing the raw, high-tech precision of a modern AI scanner (crosshairs, bounding boxes, mono-spaced data, signal accents) with the tactile, elegant world of fashion and textile lookbooks (clean typography, generous whitespace, large imagery).
design_concept.emotion: Precision, reliability, authority, and modern efficiency.

fonts.body: Manrope, sans-serif (Clean, readable at small sizes)
fonts.mono: JetBrains Mono, monospace (Used ONLY for AI similarity percentages, design numbers, and camera overlay data)

usage_rules: No full-screen gradients. Use solid colors with high contrast.
Primary Accent (Klein Blue) should be used strictly for primary CTA buttons and active states.
Warning Scan (Signal Red) is reserved for the AI scanner bounding box, crosshairs, and live recording indicators.
Never use pure black or pure white; always tint slightly for optical comfort.

grids_and_layouts.global_spacing: Use p-6 to p-8 for main screen wrappers. The design must feel breathable.
grids_and_layouts.mobile_first: Assume a mobile-first viewport (PWA/hybrid app style). Constrain max-width on desktop to 480px for the app view, or use a multi-pane split for the Admin Dashboard.
grids_and_layouts.bento_grid: For the Admin dashboard, use 'High Density Grid' (gap-4, strict row/col spans) to pack catalog and user stats.
grids_and_layouts.search_results: Grid layout (grid-cols-2). 'Cardless' look. Images must go edge-to-edge within their grid cells, separated only by thin 1px borders (Grid Borders technical look).

component_guidelines.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) for primary actions. Sharp edges (rounded-none) for catalog filters and admin controls.
component_guidelines.bottom_navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism variant. backdrop-blur-xl, saturate-150, bg-white/70, with a delicate 1px border-t. Must sit at z-50.
component_guidelines.camera_scanner_view: Full bleed image representing the camera feed. Center overlay a 'focus bracket' (4 corners, 2px border, Signal Red). Use a sweeping linear gradient line for the scanning animation.
component_guidelines.cards: For the app, use flat solid backgrounds with 1px borders. NO soft shadows. If it's a catalog item, omit the card wrapper entirely and just show the image + text directly (cardless).
component_guidelines.similarity_badge: Float this at the top right of result images. Use font-mono, bright background (e.g., solid black with white text, or pure blue).
component_guidelines.inputs_and_forms: Shadcn components heavily customized: 0px border radius (sharp), 1px solid border, floating labels if possible, high contrast focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600).

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have a hover state. Buttons should translate-y-[-1px] and increase shadow/opacity.
motion_and_interactions.scanner_animation: Use Framer Motion to create a laser-scan effect: a horizontal 1px line moving up and down the image bounds infinitely.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Subtle fade-in and slide-up (translate-y-4 to 0, opacity 0 to 1) for lists and grids.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure active states don't rely solely on color change (add a border or scale shift).

media_and_icons.image_styling: Images must have max-h-[80vh] on detail screens to prevent infinite scrolling. Use object-cover for catalog thumbnails.
media_and_icons.overlays: When text sits on an image (e.g., hero or camera), use a gradient scrim (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 to-transparent) on the bottom 30% only. Do not blanket-dim the whole image.

fabric_catalogs.description: Fabric with design - Use as the target scan image or top search result
Floral rug - Use as a similar search result (e.g., 94% match)
Black and white pattern - Use as a catalog item

admin_dashboard_backgrounds.description: Textile factory machinery - Use for admin login background or dashboard header banner
Thread spools - Use for category covers or decorative elements

empty_states.description: Tailor measuring tape - Use for empty states, 'no results found', or onboarding screens

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Build a responsive web app that mimics a high-end mobile application. Use a constrained max-width container (e.g., max-w-md mx-auto relative) for the primary mobile views, and a standard dashboard layout for the Admin section.
instructions_to_main_agent.camera_simulation: Since real camera APIs won't work in this static web view, simulate the scanner by placing a static fabric image (from image_urls) full screen, overlay a targeting reticle, a scanning line animation, and mock UI controls (Torch, Switch Camera, Cancel).
instructions_to_main_agent.routing_state: Use React state or standard router to manage navigation between: Home, Scanner View, Results List, Result Detail, and Admin Dashboard.
instructions_to_main_agent.data_mocking: Create robust mock data for the Top 20 results, ensuring they include fields: similarity_percentage, design_number, catalog, color, brand. Render the list with Framer Motion stagger effects.
instructions_to_main_agent.accessibility: Ensure contrast meets WCAG AA standards. Include data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='camera-capture-btn').

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
DO NOT use dark colors as gradients. Dark colors look good when used independently.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for sticky navs and overlays. DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for elements with content underneath.
You MUST NOT apply universal transitions (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container using text-align: center globally.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
NEVER use placeholder URLs (via.placeholder.com). Use only the provided Unsplash images in the image_urls section.
For toasts, use the 'sonner' library if available.
